page.subtitle: Sign in or create an account to access your projects.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.successDescription: Use your new password the next time you sign in.

errors.title: Could not change password
errors.validation: Check your input: password must be at least 8 characters and fields must be filled in.
errors.network: Could not reach the server. Make sure the backend is running.
Cannot reach the server. Make sure the backend is running and the API URL is correct.
errors.projectsLoadFailedDescription: Try again or check your connection to the server.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Keep all client projects, current statuses, and upcoming deadlines at hand.

delete.confirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. Project: {{name}}

form.name: Project name
form.namePlaceholder: For example: CRM for an agency
form.keyPrefixHint: Generates keys like prefix-1, prefix-2 (unique among your projects). Default: proj.
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe the project goal, context, and expected outcome

validation.keyPrefix: 2–30 characters: lowercase Latin letters, digits, hyphen; must start with a letter

notifications.createdDescription: The new project already appears in the list and in the workspace menu.
notifications.createErrorDescription: Please try again. The form data is still there.
notifications.updatedDescription: Changes are saved and visible in the list and on the project page.
notifications.updateErrorDescription: Please try again. The form data is still there.

loading.title: Loading projects
loading.description: Preparing the project list and the latest data.

error.title: Failed to load the project list
error.description: Check your connection and try again. If the error persists, refresh the page later.

empty.title: There are no projects yet
empty.description: Once the first project appears, you will be able to quickly jump to its details, tasks, and deadlines.

projectDetails.loadingDescription: Fetching project data from the server.
projectDetails.notFoundDescription: There is no project with this id or it is not available.

timeline.emptyDescription: Important milestones and agreements will appear here as the work evolves.

tasksSection.title: Project tasks
tasksSection.description: Manage tasks, deadlines, and priorities in one place.
tasksSection.loadingDescription: Preparing the task list, statuses, and upcoming deadlines.
tasksSection.errorDescription: Try refreshing the data again. If the error persists, come back to the project later.
tasksSection.emptyTitle: This project has no tasks yet
tasksSection.emptyDescription: Create the first task to capture the next step and keep the work under control.
tasksSection.filteredEmptyTitle: No tasks match the selected filters
tasksSection.filteredEmptyDescription: Reset the filters or choose different parameters to see the project tasks again.
tasksSection.descriptionFallback: Task description has not been added yet.

delete.confirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. Task: {{title}}

form.title: Task title
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Add context, agreements, and important details

drawer.title: Task card
drawer.commentsEmptyTitle: This task has no comments yet
drawer.commentsEmptyDescription: Add the first comment to capture an agreement, client request, or a note for yourself.
drawer.commentPlaceholder: Write a comment to capture a decision or agreement
drawer.historyEmptyDescription: Visible task updates and milestones will appear here once the work starts moving.
drawer.emptyDescription: Select a task from the project list to open the card and edit its details.

historyEvent.commentAddedDescription: A new agreement or note was saved in the activity feed.

notifications.createdDescription: Open it from the list and add details if needed.
notifications.updatedDescription: The task card has been updated.
notifications.updateErrorDescription: Check your connection and try again.
